content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Caravan_bg.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' debuts on ABC in 1984.]]

A list of events in '''1984''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 4|04]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 29|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 29]] published.
*[[January 11|11]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 30|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 30]] published.
*[[January 13|13]] – [[L'ain Freefall]] is born.
*[[January 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 82|''Star Wars'' (1977) 82]] published.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 31|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 31]] published.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 32|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 32]] published.
*?? – [[Return of the Jedi 4|''Return of the Jedi'' 4]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 33|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 33]] published.
*[[February 6|06]] – ''[[The Final Trap]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 34|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 34]] published.
*[[February 12|12]] – ''[[How to Draw Star Wars Heroes, Creatures, Spaceships, and other Fantastic Things]]'' published.
*12 – ''[[Star Wars Word Puzzles]]'' published
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 83|''Star Wars'' (1977) 83]] published.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Erin Rose Wage]] is born.
*15 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 35|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 35]] published.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Josh Trank]] is born.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 36|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 36]] published.
*[[February 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 37|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 37]] published.

==March==
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 38|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 38]] published.
*[[March 11|11]] – The final Star Wars newspaper comic strip is published by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[March 12|12]] – ''[[How the Ewoks Saved the Trees: An Old Ewok Legend]]'' published.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 39|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 39]] published.
*[[March 20|20]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] published.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 40|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 40]] published.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 41|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 41]] published.

==April==
*[[April 4|04]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 42|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 42]] published.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 43|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 43]] published.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]] is published.
*[[April 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]] published.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 44|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 44]] published.
*[[April 25|25]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 45|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 45]] published.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 46|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 46]] published.
*[[May 9|09]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 47|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 47]] published.
*[[May 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 86|''Star Wars'' (1977) 86]] published.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 48|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 48]] published.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[E. K. Johnston]] is born.
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 49|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 49]] published.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 50|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 50]] published.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Richard Riddell]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 51|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 51]] published.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 87|''Star Wars'' (1977) 87]] published.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 52|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 52]] published.
*[[June 20|20]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 53|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 53]] published.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 54|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 54]] published.
*[[June 28|28]] – ''[[The Baby Ewoks' Picnic Surprise]]'' published.
*?? – Star Wars has its network television premiere on [[CBS]].

==July==
*[[July 4|04]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 55|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 55]] published.
*[[July 11|11]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 56|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 56]] published.
*[[July 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 88|''Star Wars'' (1977) 88]] published.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 57|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 57]] published.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 58|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 58]] published.
*[[July 29|29]] – [[Sasha Frost]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 59|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 59]] published.
*[[August 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 60|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 60]] published.
*[[August 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 89|''Star Wars'' (1977) 89]] published.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 61|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 61]] published.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Keston John]] is born.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 62|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 62]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Jack Roth]] is born.
*01 – [[Ludwig Göransson]] is born.
*01 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 63|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 63]] published.
*[[September 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 64|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 64]] published.
*[[September 9|09]] – [[Austin Wintory]] is born.
*[[September 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 65|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 65]] published.
*[[September 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]] published.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 66|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 66]] published.
*[[September 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 67|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 67]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Josh Brener]] is born.
*[[October 6|06]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 68|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 68]] published.
*[[October 13|13]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 69|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 69]] published.
*[[October 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 91|''Star Wars'' (1977) 91]] published.
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 70|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 70]] published.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 71|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 71]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Natalia Tena]] is born.
*[[November 3|03]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 72|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 72]] published.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 73|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 73]] published.
*[[November 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 92|''Star Wars'' (1977) 92]] published.
*[[November 17|17]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 74|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 74]] published.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 75|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 75]] published.
*[[November 25|25]] – ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' debuts on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]]. For its TV broadcast, however, it's given the name ''The Ewok Adventure''. It is released theatrically, later in the UK and Australia, using its regular name.
*[[November 26|26]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 76|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 76]] published.
*?? – CBS/Fox Video releases [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] on home video.

==December==
*[[December 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 77|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 77]] published.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 78|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 78]] published.
*[[December 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]] published.
*[[December 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 79|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 79]] published.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 80|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 80]] published.
*?? – ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' published.

==Unknown==
*[[Parker Sawyers]] is born.
*''[[The Ewoks' Hang-Gliding Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Three Cheers for Kneesaa!: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Wicket Finds a Way: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (video game)]]'' released.

==External links==
*{{WP|1984}}
